textByHash.104c7c910b08cf695775f4c51d7d6565a2842779: Come talk to me when you have some frrree space forrr it.
textByHash.142f13d7cae7fd5f5242a22b2149572b7d413e92: Oh, don't worrrry, you sly dog, I'll not tell anyone.
textByHash.1932c2b578040c15623ed55f2b0f30d94ecb399c: You don't have any house keys, do you? You won't find yourself getting very far without any. Maybe come back later?
textByHash.1f48724bf70f25f7dee93abc43b11bced25d82b9: What? Why, what else would you want to eat? What kind of lycanthrrrope are you anyway?
textByHash.1ff30eafae26ac0f14ae3bef27caf03b05c50813: I hear that Caius might be leaving her house soon.
textByHash.2201a9e89a886255897a31b8a5f9a9aa767488ef: I mean it is going to take a while to get therrre, so I'm not going to ship it unless it's at least a little alive.
textByHash.2313f5e8a0b7e482e7e40c689aac8ac4bccb4957: Seems rrreasonable. Is that why they arrren't making any noise?
textByHash.24eb5fe0e70f53e2e394a9f38629ea2be282ef30: Looks like Lavinia is returning to her house. You'll have to wait a moment until we get word of the next house.
textByHash.3117472c8b323702d9647a54fa84a47163b99d5b: Already forgotten? Head over to Lavinia's house.
textByHash.36c1daea63a7d246aa034eee9eedc614e8fd7bf3: That's good. You should rrreally kick the habit beforrre it gets too late.
textByHash.3f4fb8590810cd5a3a2c618945fc9880cc0b82da: Looks like Lavinia isn't home right now. Go quickly!
textByHash.3fee1719070d07edb58f48b96e3e65da5885be7d: You know, they look verrry still...
textByHash.464dd2955bdb11c24e1b7b0155a9dbc90b89c2c0: Look, I apprrreciate you'rrre wanting to catch the meat yourrrself, I mean that's the sort of wolf I am too, but therrre is one thing.
textByHash.503db68c5594c67cc0d1837ac48ea1bfd5f9fa9d: I take it this is the crrrate?
textByHash.52cc899467a1f3a6968406056728e998b3e32e9b: Tell you what, I'll get the shipping order for a crrrate of cats wrrritten up rrright now. You just provide the meat.
textByHash.579f2f94514dbcde26f70d92f1b9e21122427a17: Although I'd prefer it if you took yourrr cat habit elsewherrre in futurrre. You understand, rrright?
textByHash.57cb78b8160d42adf5e34a0c8451632bbbb79d62: Looks like Victor isn't home right now. Go quickly!
textByHash.5bce5c40b235b0427569b29de013d30234840219: Looks like Caius is returning to her house. You'll have to wait a moment until we get word of the next house.
textByHash.5cfe5e4e43c6b472448769f09ea47d7c07256e00: His house is north of here.
textByHash.61a61da7c23de1e91e8605da3844149ca91089a9: Well, I know I wouldn't want anyone to find out I had a habit like yourrrs, but still...
textByHash.62af64ff269f00312c570120c7c134b14f7a810e: So, can I get a hint as to what you arrre sending?
textByHash.63bf20a95307d24f73f8ee8e147c6ecbb7b909f1: Looks like Victor is returning to his house. You'll have to wait a moment until we get word of the next house.
textByHash.676bc50865e1bbd928927e1aaaf4befd1eded2ef: You're carrying too much for me to give this to you now, but I have a whistle you can blow to call me when you have the crrrate filled.
textByHash.71d464596d77f756a4404d19f825ddfc317546f0: Already forgotten? Head over to Victor's house.
textByHash.72c69f2da5919f1c51fc5e86af11262e578974a2: Hello. A fine day for stealing, wouldn't you say?
textByHash.742388b76261f7ab3f5dfad60e4f210ce3092438: Herrre is the shipping orderrr. Just paste it to send that crrrate on its way!
textByHash.75d2d2011a5116ac8e3975baedabf5253988b398: Do you want me to point you in the right direction?
textByHash.77a75390d0d23c231d3b8866f7930bd8afda3c95: Looks like Lavinia is returning to his house. You'll have to wait a moment until we get word of the next house.
textByHash.77e0a69b59080afb41ca8d7b29be89a28080bcaa: I hear that Lavinia might be leaving his house soon.
textByHash.7c6228f561808ac47798719a6a5be482677d58c8: Well, I didn't think you wanted to send shoes, frrriend; this is a meat shop. What I mean is, what KIND of meat do you want to send?
textByHash.823110a90f79484e56c47689847924a6ce841f6c: You know, I think therrre might be...
textByHash.82d1eaf49efd87903d8464d18af278c20db14ca7: Wait, you are sending it live, rrright?
textByHash.8a84ab7eb9c506a8dc12bbf35798af814fd44d8a: Hmm, I hadn't hearrrd about any packs running with the pirrrates...still, I trust you.
textByHash.8d26df29002fc8e9afd3452ec04d4b0b7269f6d6: Looks like Victor is returning to her house. You'll have to wait a moment until we get word of the next house.
textByHash.8f2a96161ea96f98bb0c2d48b390fe04111a3ebd: Here, when you need me to inspect the meat, give this a blow and we'll get those tasty kitties of yours shipped off lickety split!
textByHash.90ab0ef0e42cc17bf1b43c83c01150752b4b5082: Ha, ha, ha! Of courrrse, of course!
textByHash.9234063e00daa7e120491b0e0935c00c03210d3a: Grrreat! Here's the parrrts of the crrrate. Sorrrry, but I seem to be out of nails.
textByHash.94f17353dee44e2fc542e313e74e7b35b5a8d52d: I hear that Lavinia might be leaving her house soon.
textByHash.971832c2db0856fd5d57173c82b7c177205e475e: You don't have any valuables worth my time. Come back when you do!
textByHash.97e926f3c0e31b21d53202b86209af19b1596c0d: I hear that Caius might be leaving his house soon.
textByHash.9e76db1f22ea4e653f851f5983f61ff0b520baa7: What do you want to send?
textByHash.9fbccb6922b353cb19ca119909d33ab07df04efb: Cooked food? Who would want that? You lose all the flavourrr of the meat when you can't taste the blood!
textByHash.a38f17cfc165609cacb6f386323f3f0c97b8aa4c: Already forgotten? Head over to Caius's house.
textByHash.ac8eaf54519943f9477c134159f9bec7da51f27f: Well surrre, as soon as you have some frrree space for them.
textByHash.b83a7560b8286b62b221951eadd00b76699908c7: Well, I have plenty, but you seem to have no space for it. Come back when you do.
textByHash.bac7354347a5c50b7e38b4a381f6d8406ed8b66b: Looks like Caius is returning to his house. You'll have to wait a moment until we get word of the next house.
textByHash.bcc41501d3a0e7641946cbbf7ded8808dae8cb83: I hear that Victor might be leaving her house soon.
textByHash.c1d1096bb1bb8358b7bca40629418ac77a34f4d7: I'll gladly give you a crate for the meat, but I'll have to inspect it beforrre you send it over. I don't want my name associated with anything less than 100% frrresh, you understand.
textByHash.ca5ce75a8242855f42bf9904f56c03e31dc99dc6: Well, frrriend, I take it you have-
textByHash.cf3e75dfce47da24289d600145c9a5199d5cdd34: Well, it's a bit of a way to go, but for you, I'd wrrrite up a shipping orderrr.
textByHash.d0195482ccdd16ce0e17c38059abaf17b9dc64e0: Looks like Caius isn't home right now. Go quickly!
textByHash.de578e4ff89714c2b05d583d4ca59dcfeadd4b5f: I hear that Victor might be leaving his house soon.
textByHash.e2a65d1359fcaf690148bc201182811ccfef8253: What are you doing herrre of all places? Don't you smell that weedy human, Fenkenstrrrain?
textByHash.e6d5bd57f0dc1ebef267d8f471027b00b2345589: Yes, herrre are some new ones.
textByHash.e92241de2d27ccbf53660dec189f236986a8da51: Grrreat! I have the parrrts for the crrrate forrr you when you have the space to carrrry them.
textByHash.f08a94630d8cdbddebd1b45ae9f05a3c25a9cbfd: Grrreetings frrriend! Welcome to my worrrld famous food emporrrium! All my meats are so frrresh you'd swear you killed them yourrrself!
textByHash.f2a0d68343b8137b0f4d6b990570dacf50e993fb: So, what can I expect to see when I inspect this shipment of yourrrs?
textByHash.fb00f8a1c2684470be8b75c43dda481a9470dbbe: Her house is east of here.
textByHash.fd11c59418fa457a3ebaf8e64aec7a478a366291: No buts, frrriend, you get going. I know how trrricky those things are to grab!
